name: Hot and Peppery Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except cooking spray and oil in a large glass or plastic bowl.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
4. Spray a 13x9x2-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Arrange the marinated shrimp in a single layer in the pan.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
7. Drizzle with oil and serve hot.
